design_philosophy: A high-end fintech wallet fused with a seamless video-calling experience. The design uses deep midnight blues with radiant gold accents to build trust for payments while feeling delightful and exclusive.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#060A14] overflow-x-hidden relative

surfaces_and_shadows.glass_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0C1322]/60 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces_and_shadows.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#060A14]/80 border-t border-white/5 pb-safe pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
surfaces_and_shadows.button_primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 transition-all hover:bg-[#E5C865] hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]
surfaces_and_shadows.button_secondary: bg-[#162032] text-white font-semibold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 border border-white/10 transition-all hover:bg-[#1E293B]

components_strategy.navigation: Use a fixed bottom navigation bar containing Home, Call, History, and Profile icons. Active state highlighted in gold.
components_strategy.coin_balance_card: A premium glassmorphic card on the Home screen. Use a subtle dark blue abstract background image layered with text. Large prominent balance display.
components_strategy.coin_store: Grid of coin packs. Each pack uses 'solid_card' styling with a shiny gold coin image, coin amount, and clear pricing.
components_strategy.video_call_screen: Cinematic dark interface. Floating action buttons (mute, end call, switch camera) at the bottom. A subtle pulsing effect around the user's avatar when waiting for connection.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs heavily customized: bg-[#0C1322] border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-xl h-14

image_urls.description: Dark blue abstract painting for the coin balance card background to give a premium cinematic feel
Gold round coin to be used in the Coin Store packs
Avatar for active user or incoming caller

icons.usage: Use Lucide React icons. Keep stroke width at 1.5 for a clean, elegant look.

animations.hover: Subtle transform translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow opacity.
animations.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward translation (framer-motion recommended: initial={{opacity: 0, y: 10}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}})
animations.pulse: Use Tailwind animate-pulse for the 'connecting...' state in video calls.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='login-button', data-testid='coin-balance-text', data-testid='buy-coin-pack-100'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Treat the web app as a mobile PWA. Enclose all major views within a `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative` container to simulate a mobile app interface.
Build the bottom navigation component to switch between Home, Call, and History views.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to match the Jewel & Luxury archetype. Remove default Vercel/Stripe styles.
For the coin balance card, use the glassmorphism rules provided and layer the `hero_background` image with a low opacity overlay.
Ensure the gold color `#D4AF37` is used purely for call-to-actions, active states, and coin balances to maintain premium contrast.
The video call screen should dominate the viewport, utilizing the deep dark background `#060A14` with floating control buttons.
Do not use generic font Inter for headings, strictly use Outfit.
ALWAYS apply data-testid to buttons, inputs, tabs, and coin amounts.
